line1: Ah, greetings, traveler. I can see the curiosity in your eyes.
line2: It seems you have heard the whispers as well.
line3: The air on MegaScape has grown heavy with unease.

The whispers, my friend, the whispers in the sand.
line2: It all started when the Scepter of Suleiman vanished.
line3: The Kharalos Elders passed it down through generations.

line1: Is there anything I can do to help out?
Seek out the Oracle, listen to the tales of our lore.
line2: Some say the secret to stopping the whispers
line3: lies at the bottom of the Kharalos Tomb.

line4: or discovered more about the whispers.

line2: Welcome to the Land of Vanguard. I'm Wizard Drendor.
line3: We are in grave need of your assistance!

line1: One of our Villagers has been taken by a Mighty Beast.
line2: We've exhausted many resources trying to defeat him
line3: I hope you're willing to slay the foul beast.

line1: Umm.. Well I just got here.
That's no problem at all. Assist the towns people.
line2: Your efforts will unlock knowledge of crafting powerful
line3: potions, harnessing elemental energy, and defeating
line4: powerful beasts throughout the land of Vanguard!

line1: Head North West to the Elemental Salt Mines
line2: There you will find a dungeon entrance.
line3: Climb down and rescue the lost villager

line1: Ah, greetings, adventurer! I am Father Vanguard,
line2: a humble servant of the divine.
line3: It is my duty to instruct those who
line4: seek enlightenment in the ways of prayer.

line1: Prayer, you say? Tell me more about it.
Indeed! Prayer is a sacred art that draws its power
line2: from three fundamental elements: Fire, Water, and Earth.
line3: Each of these elements has its own unique qualities and can
line4: be harnessed to strengthen your connection with the divine.

line1: Can you tell me about each of the Elements?

line2: Fire prayers represent the element of destruction
line3: They are often used to burn, blast,
line4: and smite your foes with righteous fury.

line1: Water, on the other hand, embodies the element of
line2: reflection and redirection. Water prayers are
line3: employed to reflect and flow damage back to your enemies,
line4: making them face the consequences of their actions.

line1: Lastly, Earth symbolizes the element of healing and stability.
line2: Earth prayers are primarily used for healing,
line3: mending your wounds, and providing you with the
line4: strength to endure the trials that are before you.

line1: Wow. That is a lot to take in..
We have only just scratched the surface.
line2: Would you mind completing a simple task for me?

line1: Sacrifice that urn for me and come right back!

line2: You now have a difficult choice to make.
line3: Which Elemental prayer would you like to start off with?
Fire

line1: Ah, you've chosen Earth, the path of restoration.
line2: Gaia's Blessing grants healing while in combat.

line1: Ah, you've chosen Water, the path of reflection.
line2: Ebb & Flow recoils damage dealt by your foes.

line1: Ah, you've chosen Fire, the path of destruction.
line2: Cinder's Touch will ignite your foes and apply burn damage.

line1: If you wish to gain even more strength in combat,
line2: head back to the Salt mines and speak to the Miner.
line3: Within each salt lies great energy and power!

line2: I've got a task that requires someone with a strong mining
line3: arm, and a keen eye. Are you up for a little challenge?

line1: I'm always up for a challenge! What do you need?
Three remarkable salts can be found within the mines.
line2: Damage Salt, Critical Salt, and Droprate Salt.
line3: Each of them has unique properties, and I need you
line4: collect a bit of each for my research.

line1: Damage Salt: This salt is said to enhance your combat prowess
line2: It increases your offensive power, making attacks hit harder.
line3: A valuable resource for any adventurer.

line1: Critical Salt: Critical hits can turn the tide of battle.
line2: This salt increases your chances of landing a critical hit,
line3: ensuring that your strikes are even deadlier.

line1: Droprate Salt: A favorite among treasure hunters.
line2: This salt will boost your luck when it comes
line3: It can improve your chances of getting that special rare.

line1: Would you gather 5000 of each salt for me?
line2: The rocks can be found very close by.

line1: Here, take this pickaxe. You will need it.
line2: Come back with 5000 of each Salt, then we can talk.
Take these salt fragments to our Alchemist
line3: Head over to his home and learn about his discoveries!

line1: Why hello there traveler, I see you brought me
line2: some ingredients! Has the miner sent you to speak with me?
What kind of potions can you create from these salts?

line1: Well, each salt has its unique properties that can be
Damage Elixir: Crafted by using Damage Salt
line2: This elixir will temporarily boost your combat
line3: strength, making your attacks hit harder.

line1: Critical Elixir: Crafted by using Critical Salt
line3: of landing critical hits.

line1: Droprate Elixir: Crafted by using Droprate Salt
line2: This elixir increases your luck in finding rare
line3: and valuable items. It's a must-have for
line4: any avid adventurer and treasure hunter

line1: Would you do me a favor and craft one of each?
line2: Use the salts on a vial to learn their recipes.

line1: Take these Vials and return once you have
line2: made one of each type of potion!

line1: You managed to craft all of those potions already?
line2: I must say Traveler, I'm very impressed. With your
line3: abilities and willingness to learn

line1: Krampus sent all these phony santas to kill my vibe
Is there anything I can do to help?
If you can collect enough christmas spirits, I should be able to defeat all these imposters.
Alright, I'll see what I can do.
Are you even trying? Come back when you have something worth showing.
Pshh, I knew I could do it!.
That was too easy! What were you doing just standing there??
Ah, adventurer! Just the person I was hoping to see!
line2: I've found myself in quite the predicament
line3: this Easter..

line1: What seems to be the problem?
The magical eggs I've prepared for Easter, have been umm.
Ah yes that's the word. LOST!
line2: You wouldn't mind helping me with some tasks,
line3: in order to find them would you?

line1: Alright, Mr Bunny. You can count on me.
First, I need you to gather 20 Vorpal Scraps.
line2: These can be mined at the Journeyman mine.
line3: I'll need them to fix my Egg Locator.

line1: You got it, i'll be back!
I still need those Vorpal Scraps.

line2: Next i'll need you to search the Kings Magic Wardrobe
line3: He's borrowed something of mine and not returned it.

line1: I still need you to search the Kings Magic Wardrobe..

line2: The next task may be a bit, messier...

line1: You'll need to slay 25 rabid Bunnies for me.
line2: They can be found wandering in ::easter!

line1: It seems you haven't slayed 25 Rabid Bunnies yet...
Ahh you managed to take out all of those Bunnies?
line2: Great work Adventurer, just a few more things now.

line1: What else ya got for me?
Head over to the Woodcutting area.
line2: I need you to gather 25 Vorpal logs.

line1: I still need those 25 Vorpal Logs.
line2: Come back when you have them all please.
Just one more task and I'll have a nice reward for you!

line1: I won't be able to gather all of the Eggs myself.
line2: I'll need you to collect at least one for me.
line3: They spawn randomly throughout the world.

line1: Come back when you've found that Egg!
Wow I must say, I'm impressed.
line2: You managed to complete all of those tasks.
Then I can forge an Egg Crate for you!

line3: Fire Prayer
Fire Set
